creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Created attachment 251275
Patch to update to 8.5.2

Update logitechmediaserver to 8.5.2.

Main changes include fixes in playback of some mp4 files, sorting of
files, and using additional tags for parsing the year in Ogg files.

Full changelog is here:
https://lyrion.org/getting-started/changelog-lms8/#version-852-2024-05-26-88ba56f2c
